feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: The Tax Treatment field in the Pay Component Foundation Object- SAP Successfactors "1H 2026 release"
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

1H/2026 SF update says "The Tax Treatment field in the Pay Component Foundation Object will reach End of Maintenance on May 15,2026 and will be Deleted on November 13, 2026.". 

My customer has data maintained in this field in Pay Components ( Manage Org Pay), However this field is not enabled in MBCUI.

Would there still be any impact if this field in depreciated, What action do  we need to take? 

Source- https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-release-information/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/f5bf56452d294c4ba7172d467abb40ee.html?q=tax+treatment

entry.title: Layout of company news on the latest homepage
entry.content: Hello, is it possible to display the Cards in the Organisational News-Section of the latest homepage in a different layout (e.g. one below the other) rather than as a carousel?

entry.title: Manager as on date using business rule
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any way to find out manager as of a specific date using business rules, specifically the Base Object-Job Information Model or the Compensation Information Model?

I have attempted various functions that are available; however, all of them only return the manager as of today, regardless of the date conditions.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Time Sheet Period is read as Null
entry.content:
I am setting up an error for the time sheet. I am attaching it to the Employee Time Sheet object so that it will only display when the user Submits the time sheet. The customer would like the Time Sheet Period to display in the message. I have set up the tags in the Message Definition. In the Business Rule, I have set it to read the Time Sheet Period. When the message is triggered, though, it comes back as Null. 

 

I see the time sheet period displayed in the Employee Time Sheet Object.

I have run a rule trace, and it is returning Null as the value. 

I have checked permissions and it looks like I have full permission to the Employee Time Sheet object.

Any ideas why this is not working?

Thanks,

Cindy

entry.title: job level - pay range association
entry.content:
Hi ,

We want the pay range to be determined solely based on job level, which is maintained in a custom MDF object within Job Classification, rather than the pay grade maintained in Job Information. 

Specifically, the pay range should be derived from a custom MDF field (ABC) in Job Information, then Job Level(12) in the Job Classification object. We do not want the Pay Grade (SG1) foundation object to be part of this association. However, all employees will continue to have a pay grade assigned in Job Information, and we do not intend to change that.

Given this scenario, please advise on the best approach to create the pay range association in the Corporate Data Model. We also want to use these pay ranges in Compensation Planning, 

 

Thank you

entry.title: People Intelligence Reports
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Can you tell me if the SuccessFactors People Intelligence Reports will allow us to generate reports that combine data from Employee Central, Employee Central Payroll, and Time Tracking?
When will this feature be available?
Thank you!
Best regards,

Carolina

#People Intelligence Report

#SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

#SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll 

#SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Errors while new hiring
entry.content: While making new hire, i got error as The following fields have invalid value: Company, Division, Department while add new employee in SuccessFactors. I tried to fix the associations using Configure Object Definitions for Department, division, position and also with manage business configuration, but still the errors. Tried many ways, but still.

entry.title: 1H Release 2026 Enhancements in Business Configuration UI
entry.content: With the 1H Release of Business Configuration UI enhancements, will this impact MDF data we've already set up in our instance, or only impact new objects?

entry.title: Learning only users
entry.content:
Hi, I'm looking for a process / design which enables me to create accounts in Learning only for representatives of external training providers.  As these users are non-employee's, the process / design has to show how they are prevented from accessing any other elements of the SF Platform, particularly Employee Central. 

Thanks

entry.title: Workflow delegation CC roles
entry.content: Hi everyone, is there a limitation, that workflow delegation only applies to approval workflows, or is it also possible to redirect notifications to delegatees in cc-role-only-workflows?

entry.title: SAP GROW Fast HR/SuccessFactors delivery cookbook direct link
entry.content:
Hi,

Could anyone please provide SAP GROW Fast HR/SuccessFactors delivery cookbook direct link

entry.title: Document Generation / Livecycle Designer handling multiple dependents field value
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are encountering a difficulties when trying to configure multiple  dependent field values while configuring onboarding document using  Livecycle Designer by adobe. 

We tried to use a row (wrap in subform) with repeat row for each data item with data binding PerPersonRelationship or $PerPersonRelationship.item[*] and for the cells inside the row , we are binding with PerPersonRelationship. full name/ PerPersonRelationship.relationshiptype but it is not possible to populate more than one dependent value but it is possible to repeat the single dependent value.

Do anyone has also encountering this problem and has a solution about this ?

entry.title: SmartRecruiters and SF Recruiting coexistence – Create Job from Position
entry.content:
Hello team,

We have reviewed the available documentation regarding the coexistence of SmartRecruiters and SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting (legacy) during a transition phase. The documentation generally mentions the possibility of running both solutions in parallel to support a smooth transition.

However, we could not find clear information on whether this coexistence can be driven by population or position.

More specifically, when using Position Management in SAP SuccessFactors and creating a recruiting request from the org chart (Create Job / Create Requisition from Position), how is the target system determined?

Is there any standard way to configure, for example at position, job, or organizational level, whether the recruiting request should be created in SmartRecruiters or in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting?

In other words, is it possible to have different populations or job categories routed to different recruiting systems (SmartRecruiters vs SF Recruiting), or is the target system globally defined once the integration is in place?

We would appreciate confirmation of the standard behavior and any recommendations you may have for managing this situation during a transition phase.

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

Kind regards,
Barbara

entry.title: Latest people profile compa ration cannot be hidden
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have issue with hiding compa ratio on View all screen on Latest people profile.

It should be hidden only under some conditions so I created on View rule.

Rule is hiding compa ratio field in Edit mode, and in History mode, but on View all screen its never hidden.

Also when I tried the same rule on Legacy people profile it is working fine, its hidden completely.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: SAP SF Compensation - How to manage multiple Pay Components?
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

The client requires, within the Salary review process, to have the Base salary and publish the new increment received in both the "base salary" and "on top base salary" fields.

The client has the following list of pay components to be managed in the compensation module, both as current data and during publication. Given that only one pay component can be mapped and the publication relationship is 1:1, is there a configuration that can be used to manage all pay components in the list? Is it feasible in the compensation module to use multiple pay components?

List of pay component in EC:

Base SalaryBase Salary
BaseSalary_DIR_IT BaseSalary_Director_ES BaseSalary_OOT_DE BaseSalary_Operario_ES BaseSalary_PL BaseSalary_Q_IM_OP_IT BaseSalary_RO BaseSalary_SA_HU BaseSalary_SA_UK BaseSalary_SA_USA BaseSalary_SE BaseSalary_Tariff_DE BaseSalary_ALL_FR BaseSalary_DA_HO_GR BaseSalary_HO_BE BaseSalary_SA_GR BaseSalary_SA_BE BaseSalary_SA_NL 
On top of Base SalaryOnTop_BaseSalary_PL
OnTop_BaseSalary_RO OnTop_BaseSalary_SA_GR OTBS_D_IT OnTop_BaseSal OnTop_BaseSalary_DH_GR OnTop_BaseSalary_Director_ES OnTop_BaseSalary_No_Dir_FR OnTop_BaseSalary_Operario_ES OnTop_BaseSalary_Q_IM_OP_IT OnTop_BaseSalary_SE OnTop_BaseSalary_Tariff_DE 

I would appreciate your guidance and assistance on this topic. 

Thank you in advance!

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Subordinates transfer together with manager
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When position hierarchy is set as leading hierarchy, is there option to transfer subordinates together with their manager in case when manager is changing position. As current setup will automatically set higher level manager as default manager in Job info which is ok in some cases, but in some cases new record in job info with higher level position is redundant.

Even with position types added to manager position, subordinates are still getting record in job info higher level position.

Position type setup is attached. 

Thanks

Scenario:

  1. Manager is changing position via Job info insert new record or via All actions change job and compensation info.
  2. As manager moves to new position his subordinates are transferred to next level manager of now empty position which was occupied by last manager.
  3. Subordinates are now getting new record in job info with new supervisor that is employee from next level manager position.
  4. After positions of subordinates get changes in position objects relationship to connect with new manager position, they now have 2 records in Job info, one with next level position = redundant, and one that follows actual manager = ok.

entry.title: Onboarding - Rehire with old Employment Error
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to rehire a former employee, Luis Alberto Ramirez, into position 90000546. The action being used is Rehire with Old Employment.

However, when attempting to submit the hiring action, we encounter the following screen with an error:

Error:

An application error has occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the issue persists (include the following error information:
errorId=67273211-5abd-43a1-8a18-f962fa5bf052,
timestamp=2026-04-06T20:37:24.026+0000,
along with the version information of the current screen).

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or can provide guidance on what might be causing this?

entry.title: How to implement Data Privacy and Retention Architecture in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Community 

I would like to understand  how data retention rules are configured in your organisations. 

What configuration options are available within SuccessFactors to support retention and deletion
Any constraints or risks we should be aware of
Recommended approach and next steps to move this into delivery

Thanks

entry.title: Can we have person id set different than User ID via business rule or integration centre?
entry.content: Our client has a request that user id should not be same as person id . Is this achievable via business rule or integration centre ?

entry.title: Temporary Time Information not triggering a Data Replication Proxy
entry.content:
Due to the nature of our business, we have time information being maintained in customer WFM systems, that then gets integration to SF EC via API. No issues so far. Data lands in Temporary Time Information and gets replicated to IT2003 in ECP. The next time a load is done, and a change is made to existing Temporary Time Information, we have noticed that a data replication proxy was not being triggered, and hence no error in Data Replication Monitor and no error in ECP SLG1. Took a bit of digging and back and forth with SAP for me to work out, the issue was when the actual rostered time for a day was being updated, the update only happened to the 'Work Schedule: Temporary Change' and not too the Temp Time Information (see the screenshots):

So this is the work schedule assignment (manage data --> temporary time information). Note the creation and last modified date is 30/03/2026. That was when this record was originally created. Below is temp time loaded for 06/04/2026. First load was done on 30/03/2026

On 09/04/2026 a change was made to the temp time for 06/04/2026 and you can see in the 'work schedule: temporary change: the 'created on' is 30/03/2026 and the 'last modified' is now (correctly) showing 09/04/2026

The same can be seen when you look at the segment

What hadn't change for this day those, is the "container" in manage time --> 'temporary time information' as both the 'created' and 'last modified' date is still showing 30/03/2026

I worked out that the issue was with our load files not containing a record to update this. This has now been fixed, and we now don't have an issue.

We manage multiple different call centres, different clients etc. so rostered times change all the time. In my view not unusual. And now that we've found the issue, it is all working fine.

My concern is what SAP support said, and something I have not been able to wrap my head around. So seeing if the brains trust can clarify this for me:

[SAP Support] "....the development team identified a gap in the functionality inside Employee Central solution.  Changing the Individual Work Schedule assigned to the Temporary Time Information won't trigger the event for the creation of the Data Replication Proxy"

 - Yep, figured as much but we have found the solution. Now for the confusing bit:

[SAP Support] "We can confirm that after some days of having Temporary Time Data assigned to the employee, the Individual Work Schedule inside that object is being changed, and that won't be supported anymore."

How can this not be supported come May? In the words of Denzel Washington, "please explain this to me like I am a 6 year old" Rosters/schedules change all the time. That is the whole idea of "Temporary" in 'Temporary Time Assignment"....or am I missing something?
